Title: Potential insider threat - unusual data download activity
Description: An employee in the National Security practice downloaded an unusually large volume of classified engagement files to a personal device outside of business hours. Activity flagged by DLP system. Need triage assessment.

Title: Phishing campaign targeting finance team
Description: Multiple finance team members received a targeted spear-phishing email impersonating the CFO requesting wire transfer authorisation. Two staff clicked the link. No credentials confirmed compromised yet but investigation needed urgently.

Title: Client data included in AI tool training submission
Description: A staff member inadvertently included client PII in a prompt submitted to an external generative AI tool. The data included names and financial information from an active engagement. Privacy team assessment required.

Title: Workplace harassment complaint with escalation risk
Description: A formal harassment complaint has been filed against a senior manager. The complainant has indicated they will escalate externally if not resolved within 5 business days. HR legal review needed.

Title: Forced entry attempt at Ottawa office after hours
Description: Security system logged a forced entry attempt at the Ottawa office main entrance at 02:14 AM on Feb 21. No successful entry confirmed. Footage preserved. Physical security assessment and police notification required.
